subject: [PATCH v7 05/10] mm/memory_hotplug: add __add_memory_driver_managed() with online_type arg

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch adds a new interface to the Linux kernel's memory hotplug functionality, allowing drivers to select their preferred online type (ZONE_NORMAL or ZONE_MOVABLE) when adding memory blocks. The CXL driver is the primary motivator for this change, as it needs to plumb a preferred policy through the dax kmem driver. The patch refactors existing APIs and adds proper kernel documentation while introducing no functional changes for existing users. The new interface is restricted to in-tree modules using EXPORT_SYMBOL_FOR_MODULES().
